title: 一般疑问句
prompt_en: Practice Yes/No questions with be do and can.
prompt_zh: 练习be/do/can构成的一般疑问句。
description: 掌握Are you? / Do you? / Can you? 疑问句及简短回答。
knowledge_points: 疑问句 Yes/No be do can 简短回答
teaching_markdown:
## 三种疑问句结构
- **Are you...?** → Yes, I am. / No, I'm not. (be动词疑问句)
- **Do you...?** → Yes, I do. / No, I don't. (一般动词疑问句)
- **Can you...?** → Yes, I can. / No, I can't. (能力/请求)

## 回答规则
- 问什么，答什么：Do you like coffee? → Yes, I do. (不重复整句)
- Is there...? → Yes, there is. / No, there isn't.

## 常见错误
- ❌ Are you like coffee? → ✅ Do you like coffee?
- ❌ Do you a student? → ✅ Are you a student?
- ❌ Can you to swim? → ✅ Can you swim? (can后接动词原形)

title: 过去疑问句
prompt_en: Practice past tense questions with did and were.
prompt_zh: 练习过去式疑问句：Did you? / Were you?。
description: 掌握Did you? / Were you? 过去疑问句。
knowledge_points: 过去 疑问句 did were 过去时
teaching_markdown:
## 过去疑问句两种结构
- **Did + 主语 + 动词原形**：Did you eat? — Yes, I did.
- **Was/Were + 主语 + ...?**：Were you at home? — Yes, I was.

## 关键规则
- Did 后面动词**必须用原形**：Did you went ❌ → Did you go ✅
- was/were 依主语选择：I/he/she/it → was；you/we/they → were

## 常用时间词
- yesterday (昨天) / last night (昨晚) / last week (上周)
- ...ago (…以前) / this morning (今天早上)

title: 6W问句
prompt_en: Practice Wh- questions: What Who Where When Why Which.
description: 掌握6W疑问词的用法和疑问句语序。
knowledge_points: Wh- 疑问句 6W 特殊疑问句
teaching_markdown:
## 6个核心疑问词
| 疑问词 | 问什么 | 例句 |
|--------|--------|------|
| What | 事物/内容 | What is your name? |
| Who | 人 | Who is she? |
| Where | 地点 | Where is the bathroom? |
| When | 时间 | When do you get up? |
| Why | 原因 | Why are you late? |
| Which | 选择 | Which one is yours? |

## 疑问句语序
**疑问词 + be/do + 主语 + ...?**
- What is your name? (be动词)
- Where do you live? (实义动词需要do)

## 常见错误
- ❌ Where you live? → ✅ Where do you live?
- ❌ Why you are late? → ✅ Why are you late?

title: What与Who详细问
prompt_en: Practice detailed questions with What and Who.
description: 掌握What time/color/kind of 和 Who is/Whose 问句。
knowledge_points: What Who Whose 详细 疑问
teaching_markdown:
## What 的详细问法
- **What time** (几点)：What time is it? — It's 3 o'clock.
- **What kind of** (什么类型)：What kind of music do you like?
- **What color** (什么颜色)：What color is your car?

## Who/Whose 详细问法
- **Who is** (谁)：Who is your best friend?
- **Whose** (谁的)：Whose book is this? — It's mine.

## 注意
- What time 问具体时间点；When 可以问更宽泛的时间
- Whose 后面直接跟名词，回答用 mine/yours/his 等

title: 数量与价格
description: 掌握How搭配数量/价格/距离/时长的问法。
knowledge_points: How many much far long 疑问
teaching_markdown:
## How 搭配数量
- **How many + 可数名词复数**：How many books do you have?
- **How much + 不可数名词**：How much water do you drink?

## How 搭配价格
- **How much is this?** — It's 20 dollars. (问价格)

## How 搭配距离/时长/年龄
- **How far** (多远)：How far is it from here? — About 2 km.
- **How long** (多久)：How long does it take? — 30 minutes.
- **How old** (多大)：How old are you? — I'm 25.

## 常见错误
- ❌ How many water? → ✅ How much water? (不可数用much)
- ❌ How much books? → ✅ How many books? (可数用many)

title: 频率与方式
description: 掌握How often/do/about/how was的交流用法。
knowledge_points: How often about 频率 方式 感受
teaching_markdown:
## How 搭配频率
- **How often** (多久一次)：How often do you exercise? — Every day.
- 回答：every day / once a week / twice a month / sometimes

## How 搭配方式
- **How do you go to work?** — By bus. (问交通方式)
- **How do you learn English?** — I listen and practice. (问方法)

## How 感受问候
- **How was your day?** — It was good. (问候)
- **How does it taste?** — Delicious. (问感受)
- **How about some coffee?** — Sure! (提建议)
- **How do you like...?** — I like it. (问看法)
